questions.question: _______ is not caused by airborne transmission.

Read the statements and answer the question based on it. Statements: 1. Some mammals are extinct and some are critically endangered. 2. All dinosaurs are extinct. 3. Some reptiles are critically endangered and some are already extinct. Which option logically follows the given statements?

options.b: There are no reptiles that are out of the danger of extinction.
options.d: Some reptiles are dinosaurs who are extinct.

questions.question: The age difference between M and R is the same as that between P and M. M is elder to P but younger to R. If the sum of the ages of R and P is 66, how old is M?
